original_abstract: The Polish translation was well accepted by patients during this translation and initial content validity testing. Issues arising during the translation process may recur in other translations and be resolved in a similar manner.
humanized_abstract: The Polish version was well accepted by the patients in the validation study. Future translations will be investigated to see if the same issues arise and how they can be resolved.

document.output: The Polish version was well accepted by the patients in the validation study. Future translations will be investigated to see if the same issues arise and how they can be resolved.
document.input: The Polish translation was well accepted by patients during this translation and initial content validity testing. Issues arising during the translation process may recur in other translations and be resolved in a similar manner.
